title: centaurea heleniifolia
intro: Centaurea heleniifolia, also known as yellow knapweed, is a perennial plant in the daisy family, characterized by its bright yellow or white flowers and tall, slender stems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Centaurea heleniifolia include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
